subject: BDV2 Validation Blocked - No Test Credentials

content.issue: BDV2 has no valid test credentials for validation
content.impact: ALL BDV2 auth feature validation is blocked
content.required_action: Create test user in BDV2 NextAuth database and update ~/.env.test-credentials
content.notes: Melo credentials exist but BDV2 has separate database. Infrastructure issue, not code issue.
